mapper.sql: sqa.id, sqa.assessment_quarter, sqa.work_card, sqa.name, sqa.assessment_level, sqa.create_time, sqa.create_by, sqa.update_time, sqa.update_by, sqa.se_id, sqa.enabled_flag, sqa.submission_identification_flag, sqa.submitter, sqa.submit_time,sqa.assessment_num

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.assessment_quarter as ${tAlias}_assessment_quarter, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.assessment_level as ${tAlias}_assessment_level, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.se_id as ${tAlias}_se_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.submission_identification_flag as ${tAlias}_submission_identification_flag, ${tAlias}.submitter as ${tAlias}_submitter, ${tAlias}.submit_time as ${tAlias}_submit_time, ${tAlias}.assessment_num as ${tAlias}_assessment_num

select isnull((select pe.name from pm_employee pe join fnd_user fu on fu.id = sqa.update_by and fu.employee_id = pe.id ), '') as update_by_str,
,se.department as department, se.administrative_office as administrative_office from swm_quarterly_assessment sqa, swm_employee se
mapper.insert: insert into swm_quarterly_assessment (assessment_quarter, work_card, name, assessment_level, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, se_id, enabled_flag, submission_identification_flag, submitter, submit_time, assessment_num ) values (#{assessmentQuarter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assessmentLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{enabledFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, #{submissionIdentificationFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, #{submitter, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{submitTime, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, #{assessmentNum, jdbcType = DECIMAL} )
mapper.delete: update swm_quarterly_assessment set enabled_flag = 0, update_time = getdate(), update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where assessment_quarter = #{assessmentQuarter, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and enabled_flag = 1
mapper.update: update swm_quarterly_assessment set assessment_quarter = #{assessmentQuarter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assessment_level = #{assessmentLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, se_id = #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag, jdbcType=BIT}, submission_identification_flag = #{submissionIdentificationFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, submitter = #{submitter, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, submit_time = #{submitTime, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, assessment_num = #{assessmentNum, jdbcType = DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update swm_quarterly_assessment set submission_identification_flag = 1, submitter = #{submitter, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, submit_time = #{submitTime, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, assessment_num = #{assessmentNum, jdbcType = DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and enabled_flag = 1
mapper.select: select top 1 sqa.assessment_quarter from swm_quarterly_assessment sqa where (left(sqa.assessment_quarter, 4) + RIGHT(sqa.assessment_quarter, 2)) = (select max((left(sqat.assessment_quarter, 4) + RIGHT(sqat.assessment_quarter, 2))) from swm_quarterly_assessment sqat where sqat.enabled_flag = 1 ) and sqa.enabled_flag = 1
select count(1) from swm_quarterly_assessment sqa where sqa.enabled_flag = 1 and sqa.assessment_quarter = #{quarter, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update sqa set update_time = sqai.create_time, update_by = sqai.update_by, submission_identification_flag = 1, submitter = (select top 1 pe.name from pm_employee pe join fnd_user fu on pe.id = fu.employee_id where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and fu.enabled_flag = 1 and fu.id = sqai.update_by), submit_time = sqai.update_time, assessment_num = sqai.assessment_num from swm_quarterly_assessment sqa join swm_quarterly_assessment_interface sqai on sqa.se_id = sqai.se_id and sqa.enabled_flag = 1 and sqa.assessment_quarter = sqai.assessment_quarter and sqai.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} AND sqai.se_id != - 1 AND sqai.data_status = 'T'
